description: Triggers when the user needs help with revenue operations — lead lifecycle, MQL/SQL definitions, lead scoring, routing, pipeline management, or CRM automation
should_trigger: Help me define MQL and SQL criteria for our B2B SaaS — marketing and sales keep arguing about lead quality
Build a lead scoring model for our CRM with explicit fit and implicit engagement scores
Design a lead routing system that assigns enterprise leads to senior AEs and SMB to junior reps
Set up SLAs between marketing and sales for the MQL-to-SQL handoff
Create pipeline stage definitions with required fields and exit criteria in HubSpot
We have too many duplicates in our CRM — help me set up a dedup strategy
Build a RevOps metrics dashboard with MQL-to-SQL rate, pipeline velocity, and win rate
should_not_trigger: Write a cold email sequence for outbound prospecting
Help me set up my pricing tiers
Create a landing page for lead generation
